source: Adapted from review-team [secondary-citation, concept-only]: https://github.com/ronneylira/review-team. Dropped Testing (pre-merge concern, /debug critic fires on live) and Complexity (subjective, merged into correctness). 2026-04-30 initial taxonomy.

lenses.prompt_fragment: Logic bugs, off-by-one, wrong conditions, type mismatches, null/undefined handling, complexity-induced correctness drift.
Auth bypass, injection (SQL/shell/template), secrets in plaintext, exposed APIs, missing rate limits, unsafe deserialization, path traversal.
Missing try/catch, unhandled promise rejections, silent failures, swallowed exceptions, error paths not returning to caller.
Hot-loop sync I/O, unbounded growth (Maps/arrays not pruned), blocking calls inside fast loops, N+1 patterns, missing debounce/coalesce on writes.
Race conditions, shared-state without locks, async fan-out without bounded parallelism, missing isolation, ordering assumptions.
Unreferenced functions, orphan hooks, stale imports, branches that can never fire, unused config keys.
Outdated flags, wrong env vars, expired keys, deprecated API endpoints, references to retired services or files.
Missing logs at decision points, silent failures with no alert path, no heartbeat, errors logged but not surfaced.

changelog.change: Initial 8-lens taxonomy derived from review-team [secondary-citation]; dropped Testing + Complexity per Phase 1 SPEC §3 rationale.
